installation_requirements.minimum_embedment: 2 inches minimum, greater embedment provides additional strength
installation_requirements.leveling_shims: Available in thicknesses from 1/8 to 1/4 and 1/2 to 1/4 inch

notes: Flush mounted installation with manually covered rolling jack lowering pocket
Configuration most often used for fleet maintenance applications
Grating recommended to cover rolling jack pocket during normal operation
Front of lift unit placed to front of lift trench
Allow approximately 60 inches at rear of lift for motion
Concrete strength minimum f'c=4,500 psi recommended
Full 28 day f'c strength required before anchor bolt installation
Two layers of grade 60 reinforcement minimum
Reinforcing steel installed to not interfere with anchor bolts
